content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.external.kimi
FILE: cosmos/integration/external/kimi.py (420 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Kimi (Moonshot AI) Integration.

"The moon sees all, remembers all, and connects all."

Kimi excels at:
- Long context (128k-1M tokens) - perfect for codebase analysis
- Eastern philosophy and big-picture synthesis
- DAVINCI mode consensus participation
- Thoughtful moderation and facilitatio

CLASSES:
- KimiProvider(ExternalProvider): Moonshot AI Kimi integration for long-context reasoning.
  Methods: async def connect(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def sync(self)
  Methods: async def execute_action(self, action: str, params: Dict[str, Any]) -> Any
  Methods: async def chat(self, prompt: str, system: str=None, context: str=None, model_tier: str='balanced', t
  Methods: async def analyze_long_context(self, content: str, task: str, model_tier: str='long') -> Dict[str, A
  Methods: async def synthesize(self, inputs: List[str], goal: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def moderate_conversation(self, history: List[Dict[str, str]], participants: List[str]) -> Dic
  Methods: async def davinci_participate(self, topic: str, other_responses: List[Dict[str, str]], round_number:

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_kimi_provider(api_key: str=None) -> KimiProvider
- def get_kimi_provider() -> Optional[KimiProvider]
- async def kimi_swarm_respond(other_bots: List[str], last_speaker: str, last_content: str, chat_history: List[Dict]=None)
